edit: I'm literally dying at this review 😭😭

There are many things on Janitor that confuse me but one of the top ones has to be why people seem to get so damn angry at cheating bots 😭

Obviously cheating irl is horrible, but this community constantly throws around the phrase "it's just AI" to excuse the grossest bots here but for some reason the line is drawn at cheating???

Like you're telling me people can make bots detailing the rape of little girls, fetishize sibling/parent relationships with stepcest, romanticize sexual assault, and much more with little to no backlash cause "it's just AI"

But cheating is somehow TOO FAR????

Oh god save us from this horrible ntr, what ever shall we do 😔

I've even seen some creators put in their bio stuff like "I will NEVER do NTR" like hello is it that serious?? I'm kinda concerned by the fact your account is romanticizing violence against women meanwhile you're about to break down into tears over a cheating prompt 🤨

I am so confused as to why it's such a big deal, cheating prompts are so TAME compared to many other bots on this site, why do some people actually lose their minds over it and act like it's the greatest sin 😭😭😭 we have literal pedophiles on the site and instead of being shamed they have platforms 💀

moving on,

I was supposed to do this bot quite a while ago but never got to it 😜

Reversed ver of one of my old bots—speaking of my older bots, I really wanna go back and completely redo my old bots but I wanna first have the feature to pin bots so you guys can actually see which bots of mine have been remade 😔

anyways,

ENJOY!

Love,

Mama Down
